fullArticle:
Glam teams in Paris for the spring 2027 menswear shows had their work cut out for them in the record-breaking heat: keeping hair frizz-free, and skin luminous rather than sweaty. Yet the week’s standout beauty moments did more than survive the soaring temperatures—they made a compelling case for paying just as close attention to the men’s runways as the women’s calendar.

Take the Rick Owens show, which took an earlier slot in an attempt to beat the heat. Models stomped the Palais de Tokyo ramp in bulbous black jackets with built in air-con and sharp-shouldered tailoring; the makeup and hair looks followed the freak rhythm. Daniel Sällström contrasted washed-out pink lids and balmy lips with black-out contact lenses and sculptural lashes. 40 pairs of handcrafted lashes were made by Martina...
